{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Storm Icon
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Storm Icon]] was used to obscure the future during the battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
